active_playbooks.title: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
diagnosis: Check video size/aspect ratio mismatch (cropped on feed?)
Compare thumb-stop by audience and placement
actions: Add motion within first 1 second (pan, zoom, text slide-in)
Use face or eyes (human presence increases scroll-stops)
Add headline overlays on first frame ('3BHK | ₹1.35Cr | Ready 2025')
Use pattern interrupts (camera shakes, cuts, quick zooms)
Test UGC hooks ('POV: You finally find a 3BHK with 3 balconies')
Try native feel (looks like a reel, not an ad)

patterns.detail: Top 1 ads: avg CPL ₹569, CTR 0.79%, CPM ₹36, Freq 1.49
Bottom 1 ads: avg CPL ₹1637, CTR 0.94%, CPM ₹528, Freq 1.41
Bottom performers cost 2.9x more per lead (₹1637 vs ₹569).
Top performers: 100% video, 0% static. Bottom: 0% video, 100% static.
High-CTR ads (>0.7%) have 11% lower CPL (₹1103 vs ₹1238). Investing in CTR improvement directly reduces CPL.

recommendations.category: CPL Cost Spiral — Form, Audience & Creative Triage
recommendations.detail: CPL ₹2991 > ₹910 alert (target ₹700 × 1.3). 3 possible root causes identified.

root_causes.solution: Expand audience: add nearby geo, broaden Advantage+ signals, test new interest signals.

root_causes.cause: Form friction / CVR issue (traffic quality OK but not converting)
root_causes.evidence: CTR 1.15% and CPM ₹673 are acceptable but CPL still high
root_causes.solution: Simplify lead form (2-3 MCQs max). Add price in creative to pre-qualify. Check form→CRM latency.

root_causes.evidence: Verify optimization is set to 'Leads', not 'Form Opens' or 'View Content'
root_causes.solution: Check ad set optimization event. Ensure it targets highest-value conversion (lead submission).

recommendations.category: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
recommendations.action: Fix first 3 seconds on 2 video ads
recommendations.detail: Video ads with TSR < 20%: DM_Static_Your home has b, DM_Influencer - 2. Add motion at 0-1s, use face/eyes, headline overlay, pattern interrupts.

recommendations.action: Increase budget on 'DM Amara | Adv+OT | [HNIs Narrowed by Re' by 20-25%
recommendations.detail: Score: 65.0/100, CPL: ₹674 (within target), 7 leads. SOP: Scale max 25%.
